summary.boundary: Action index is a project-management layer; it does not create or certify new scientific evidence.

rows.expected_outputs: repeat status JSON/CSV/MD; repeat manuscript snippet; refreshed manuscript evidence chain after completion
rows.routes_unlocked: CES stronger route; CEJ prerequisite partially; reviewer uncertainty response
rows.do_not_do_now: Do not rerun or reinterpret repeat evidence beyond the bounded stochastic-variability statement.

rows.current_status: valid_pressure_cases=3, strict_pressure_cases=3, engineering_screening_cases=3, manuscript_ready=True, unique_flow_geometries=3, geometry_distinguishable=True
rows.expected_outputs: pressure evidence status; manuscript snippet only if valid returned pressure data exist
rows.routes_unlocked: CEJ stretch; IJMF upgrade; stronger CES discussion
rows.do_not_do_now: Do not rerun pressure evidence unless handoff geometry or resistance fields change.

rows.expected_outputs: readiness audit; abstract alignment audit; manuscript argument map
rows.routes_unlocked: All bounded routes; prevents overclaim-driven rejection
rows.do_not_do_now: Do not add critical-transition, pressure-calibrated or experimental-imaging language.

rows.expected_outputs: journal targeting matrix; journal-specific title/abstract/keyword variants
rows.routes_unlocked: CES first; particle-science fallback; computational-workflow fallback; fusion/nuclear backups
rows.do_not_do_now: Do not switch to Nuclear Fusion or CEJ without the stated evidence upgrades.

rows.expected_outputs: final submission gate; author/admin action list; submission form packet
rows.routes_unlocked: Actual journal submission after scientific route is chosen
rows.do_not_do_now: Do not submit with placeholder DOI, funding, competing-interest or corresponding-author metadata.
